| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_RX_ONE_MORE` | macro | 359 | Value for rx one more Configure receiver to automatically clear the receive_detect register after sending next GoodCRC. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_SEND_FRS_SIGNAL` | macro | 364 | Value for send fast role swap signal Send FRS if TCPC is source with FRS enabled in power control register. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_RESET_TRANSMIT_BUF` | macro | 366 | Value for reset transmit buffer - TCPC resets the pointer of transmit buffer to offset 1. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_RESET_RECEIVE_BUF` | macro | 371 | Value for reset receive buffer If buffer pointer is at 132 or less, it is reset to 1, otherwise it is reset to 133. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_I2CIDLE` | macro | 373 | Value for i2c idle. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1` | macro | 376 | Register address - device capabilities 1. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_VBUS_NONDEFAULT_TARGET` | macro | 378 | Bit for vbus high voltage target - if set, VBUS_HV_TARGET register is implemented. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_VBUS_OCP_REPORTING` | macro | 380 | Bit for vbus over current reporting - if set, vbus over current is reported by TCPC. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_VBUS_OVP_REPORTING` | macro | 382 | Bit for vbus over voltage reporting - if set, vbus over voltage is reported by TCPC. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_BLEED_DISCHARGE` | macro | 384 | Bit for bleed discharge - if set, bleed discharge is implemented in TCPC. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_FORCE_DISCHARGE` | macro | 386 | Bit for force discharge - if set, force discharge is implemented in TCPC. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_VBUS_MEASURE_ALARM_CAPABLE` | macro | 391 | Bit for vbus measurement and alarm capable If set, TCPC supports vbus voltage measurement and vbus voltage alarms. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_SRC_RESISTOR_MASK` | macro | 393 | Mask for source resistor supported. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_SRC_RESISTOR` | macro | 399 | Macro to extract the supported source resistors from register value The value can be cast to enum tc_rp_value and value can be treated as highest amperage supported since the TCPC has also to support lower values than specified. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_SRC_RESISTOR_RP_DEF` | macro | 402 | Value for Rp default only - only default amperage is supported. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_SRC_RESISTOR_RP_1P5_DEF` | macro | 404 | Value for Rp 1.5A and default - support for 1.5A and for default amperage. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_SRC_RESISTOR_RP_3P0_1P5_DEF` | macro | 406 | Value for Rp 3.0A, 1.5A and default - support for 3.0A, 1.5A and default amperage. |

| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_POWER_ROLE_SNK` | macro | 416 | Value for support sink role only. |
